notes.legalContext: This configuration is specifically designed for a South African law firm specializing in criminal defense under the South African Criminal Procedure Act and related legislation.
notes.dataPrivacy: All document storage is encrypted at rest and in transit. Access to documents and analysis is strictly controlled via role-based access.
notes.languageSupport: The system supports English, isiXhosa, isiZulu, and Afrikaans legal documents, covering the major languages used in South African legal proceedings.
notes.complianceNote: This deployment is configured to comply with the Protection of Personal Information Act (POPIA) and relevant legal data handling requirements in South Africa.
notes.securityConsiderations: In production, all placeholder passwords and keys must be replaced with strong, unique credentials stored in a secure vault.
notes.highAvailability: The deployment is configured for high availability with redundancy in all critical components.
